lines.english: I humbly pray to invoke the Universal Lord God, the Lord of the World.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਾਲਕੁ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਰਬ ਠਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: khaalak rav rahiaa sarab tthaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Creator Lord is all-pervading, everywhere. ||1||Pause||
Within your heart, worship and adore the Destroyer of fear.
He is perfect, ever-present everywhere, the Liberator. ||2||
He is the Lord of the Universe, the Life of the World.
The Master Rishi of the senses, Lord of the World, Lord of the Universe.
spiritual teacher, prophet, religious teacher.
You are the One and only merciful Master,
more sacred than the Koran and the Bible. ||3||
Master of hearts, Dispenser of justice,
The all-pervading Lord is the support of each and every heart.
The Lord is powerful and merciful.
The luminous Lord dwells everywhere.
Bless me with devotion and meditation, O Lord Creator.
His play cannot be known. ||4||
Be kind and compassionate to me, O Creator Lord.
Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl:
Says Nanak, the Guru has rid me of doubt.
The Muslim God Allah and the Hindu God Paarbrahm are one and the same. ||5||34||45||
Meditating on the Lord, Har, Har, pain will not afflict you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur ke charan kamal man vase |
lines.english: When the Lord's lotus feet are enshrined in the mind,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਬਿਕਾਰ ਤਨ ਤੇ ਸਭਿ ਨਸੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: mahaa bikaar tan te sabh nase |1|
lines.english: all terrible evils are taken away from the body. ||1||
The sins of millions of incarnations are eradicated.
Sing the Praise of the Lord of the World, O mortal being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਕਥ ਕਥਾ ਸਾਚੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪੂਰਨ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: akath kathaa saachee prabh pooran jotee jot samaanee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Unspoken Speech of the True Lord God is perfect. Dwelling upon it, one's light merges into the Light. ||1||Pause||
Night and day, serve God.
by the Grace of the Saints, meditate on the immortal Lord.
Hunger and thirst are totally quenched;
Worldly entanglements are ended, when God becomes merciful.
Gazing upon the Blessed Vision of the Guru's Darshan, I am enraptured.
This is the sign that one has met with the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਨਿਤ ਰਸਨਾ ਗਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har ke gun nit rasanaa gaaeaa |3|
lines.english: With my tongue, I continually sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||3||
My perfect pre-destined karma has been activated.
The Saints of the Lord are accepted and approved forever.
The foreheads of the Saintly people are marked with the Lord's insignia.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਸ ਕੀ ਰੇਣੁ ਪਾਏ ਜੇ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: daas kee ren paae je koe |
lines.english: One who is blessed with the dust of the feet of the Lord's slave,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਪਰਮ ਗਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥੪॥੩੫॥੪੬॥
lines.translit: naanak tis kee param gat hoe |4|35|46|
lines.english: O Nanak, obtains the supreme status. ||4||35||46||
Let yourself be a sacrifice to the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan.
Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl:
Focus your heart's meditation on the Lord's lotus feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੀ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਮਲੁ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: janam janam kee duramat mal jaae |1|
lines.english: and the filthy evil-mindedness of countless incarnations will be washed off. ||1||
Meeting Him, egotistical pride is eradicated,
Apply the dust of the feet of the Saints to your forehead,

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਜਪੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee keerat japeeai har naau |
lines.english: This is the Guru's Praise, to chant the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਸਭੁ ਨਦਰੀ ਆਵੈ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪੂਰਨ ਭਗਵਾਨ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: paarabraham sabh nadaree aavai kar kirapaa pooran bhagavaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: and you will come to see the Supreme Lord God in all. The Perfect Lord God has showered His Mercy. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਸਦਾ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee bhagat sadaa gun gaau |
lines.english: This is devotion to the Guru, to sing forever the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਕਰਿ ਜਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee surat nikatt kar jaan |
lines.english: This is contemplation upon the Guru, to know that the Lord is close at hand.
The mind becomes content and satisfied through the Word of the Guru's Shabad.
Hunger and thirst shall never afflict you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਸਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਮਾਨੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad sat kar maan |2|
lines.english: Accept the Word of the Guru's Shabad as Truth. ||2||
Through the Word of the Guru's Teachings, look upon pleasure and pain as one and the same.
The Guru is the Supreme Lord God; the Guru is the Lord of the Universe.
The Guru is the Great Giver, merciful and forgiving.
Meditate on the Lord of the Universe, and He will cover all your faults. ||3||
O slave Nanak, is blessed with perfect destiny. ||4||36||47||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਚਰਨੀ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਮਨੁ ਲਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur charanee jaa kaa man laagaa |
lines.english: One whose mind is attached to the Guru's feet,
